title: Modern Jewish Communities Across Southeast Asia
title_zh: 东南亚的现代犹太社区
title_he: קהילות יהודיות מודרניות ברחבי דרום-מזרח אסיה

images.header_description: A Chinese brushstroke landscape painting in traditional shan shui (山水) style depicting Southeast Asian scenery: lush tropical mountains shrouded in mist, palm trees bending in ocean breeze, and a serene coastline with traditional boats. In the foreground, subtle architectural elements blend a Southeast Asian temple roof line with a Star of David motif woven into decorative lattice work. The color palette features soft grays and blacks for ink wash, with touches of warm amber for tropical sunset glow and deep teal for the sea. The mood is contemplative and welcoming, suggesting the meeting of ancient traditions in modern times.
